metadata.title: Nailing a Perfect 2v1 Site Hold With Smart Angles on VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a tight 2v1 site defense where positioning and quick reactions turn the round. Notice the patient peeks and clean shots that make the difference.
Where do you like to hold sites in clutch situations?

Drop your own clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
